title: 50Pcs Round Food Containers with Lids- 150ml (5oz) Plastic Sauce Pots Small Deli Pots, Meal Prep Takeaway Containers, Reusable Portion Cups for Sauce, Dips, Salad, Restaurants, Delivery
features: [Reliable material and reusable]: Made of high-quality BPA-free material, these 50pcs sauce pot containers with lids are 100% food-grade odorless and reusable, can store food directly with confidence. Reliable material ensures sturdy and durable, not easily be deformed or broken when squeezed.

[Leakproof and airtight lids]: Comes with secure lids, these food storage containers are designed to have a perfect fit for airtight sealing, can prevent air from entering in, help maintain freshness of food, keep nutrients to stay longer, guaranteeing no spillage, a lot of restaurants use these for takeaway food delivery, sauces and chutneys.

[Microwave & freezer safe]: These 50pcs plastic food storage containers are microwave and freezer safe, can conserve your food at both low and high temperature，you can put them in freezer and take out when you need, really an ideal and handy tool in your kitchen.

[Lightweight for on-to-go]: These 50pcs plastic containers (5oz/150ML×50pcs) are compact, stackable and handy, can be easily taken away from places and do not occupy too much space. Enjoy the on-to-go food on a lovely day!

[Multipurpose usage]: Whether prepare meal at home, pack lunch meal, pack fruit and vegetables or take leftover to go, our plastic storage containers can meet all your requirements, also the secure-designed lids are perfect for storing soups, water, sauces and other liquid without spills or leakage. Other usage include medicine, button storage, jelly pots, snack pots, fruit pots for children's lunch.
description: Product Description Sauce Pots with Transparent Leakproof Lids Classic black sauce pots and transparent lids design, good quality and leakproof. Different capacity available, 2oz/4oz/5oz/7oz with transparent lids, meet all your requirement. Multifunctional organiser for salad dressings, condiments, sauces, jelly, store small items like buttons, pills, ect. Ideal for Home Cooking As an ideal household tool for food storage, these clear plastic containers can help you prepare meals in advance before big parties and holidays, save your valuable time while keep ingredient fresh at the same time. Great in Take Away Food Durable plastic containers are suitable for commercial use like catering or takeaway delivery, you can use them as handy tools to pack food to go and solve leftover issues, also great in storing small objects like jelly, pins, stationery, buttons, keys and so on. Leakproof Lids Special secure design on lids can stop air entering in, allows the containers to achieve excellent sealing ability, perfect for storing any liquid ingredient like sauce, soup, water, without spills or leaks. Reliable Quality Adopt premium BPA-free material, these plastic food storage containers are more durable and reliable, total non-toxic and without horrible odour. Transparent lids are more easily to identify what's inside while still keeping contents secure. Stackable Design By stacking these plastic sauce pots, can save a large amount of space in your fridge and kitchen, making your place tidy in an easy way. Sauce Pots with Lids As condiment cups and portion cups, capacity of 5oz for each can provide the perfect portion for any purpose in your daily life, not only maintains good portion control, also cuts down on waste, a great solution for serving all kinds of condiments at restaurants, improving carryout service. Product Specification Colour: Black and Transparent Material: Durable BPA-free plastic Capacity: 5oz/150ml Package includes: 50pcs sauce pots with lids Applications: Plastic containers for food and small items Microwave freezer dishwasher safe, effectively keep freshness of food
